introSection: Family Coaster is a steel kiddie roller coaster currently located at Koala Park in Baku, Absheron, Azerbaijan.

sections.title: Colour scheme
sections.content: Yellow track. The ride's supports are different colours.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: The train is designed to resemble a caterpillar.

fullText:
Family Coaster is a steel kiddie roller coaster currently located at Koala Park in Baku, Absheron, Azerbaijan.



Yellow track. The ride's supports are different colours.

The train is designed to resemble a caterpillar.
